title: Production API returns 502 for payment checkout
description: Customers report checkout failures. Gateway logs show repeated 502 responses from the payment API endpoint after the latest deployment.

title: RPA bot fails on invoice queue
description: The unattended invoice bot cannot process queue items because the selector for the supplier number field no longer matches the page.

title: Database deadlock causes order delays
description: Order processing is slow and intermittent. SQL logs show deadlock events and connection pool waits during peak traffic.

title: Users cannot login with SSO
description: Multiple users receive unauthorized errors during login. OAuth token validation fails after identity provider certificate rotation.

title: Kubernetes pods restarting due to memory pressure
description: Container pods for the reporting service restart repeatedly. Node metrics show high memory usage and latency spikes.

title: Non-prod database timeout during test run
description: A staging SQL query timeout occurred while testing a reporting migration. No customers are affected.

title: Intermittent behavior reported without logs
description: A user reported unusual behavior, but the affected service, timestamps and error messages are not known yet.
